input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.4.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.4.6
            TITLE: the diagonal side impact member must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.4.6: The Diagonal Side Impact Member must:
F.6.4.6 The Diagonal Side Impact Member must: 
a. Connect the Upper Side Impact Member and Lower Side Impact Member forward of the 
Main Hoop and rearward of the Front Hoop 
b. Completely Triangulate the bays created by the Upper and Lower Side Impact Members.

final_answer:
rule F.6.4.6: The Diagonal Side Impact Member must:
a. Connect the Upper Side Impact Member and Lower Side Impact Member forward of the Main Hoop and rearward of the Front Hoop
b. Completely Triangulate the bays created by the Upper and Lower Side Impact Members.
